nasb.text: Elkanah her husband said to her, “Do what seems best to you. Remain until you have weaned him; only may the Lord confirm His word.” So the woman remained and nursed her son until she weaned him.

esv.text: Elkanah her husband said to her, “Do what seems best to you; wait until you have weaned him; only, may the Lord establish his word.” So the woman remained and nursed her son until she weaned him.

cnv.text: 她丈夫以利加拿對她說：“你看怎樣好，就怎樣作吧。你可以留在這裡，等到你給孩子斷了奶，但願耶和華實現他的話。”於是哈拿留在家裡乳養孩子，直到給他斷了奶。

ccb.text: 以利加拿说：“就依你的意思吧。愿耶和华成就祂的应许。”于是，她就留在家中哺养孩子，直到孩子断奶。
